title: EBE Models OptimizedPack
description: EBE models optimized, cull more face! Get more FPS!
body:
> ![note](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Mqxx/GitHub-Markdown/main/blockquotes/badge/dark-theme/note.svg)
> [EBE 0.8.1+ ](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe/version/0.8.1+1.19.3) has implemented this pack's many changes, so using this pack again has not improved much.

EBE-Models-OptimizedPack

EBE models optimized, cull more face! Get more FPS! **[Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe) Required!**

Compare(Base EBE 0.8 or earlier version)

Render 1000 chests [261FPS-->300FPS]
